name: Best Deviled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:10
1. Slice the eggs in half lengthwise and carefully remove the yolks.
2. Mash the yolks with mayonnaise.
3. Add relish, mustard, salt, and pepper to the mashed yolks; stir well.
4. Spoon the yolk mixture into the egg whites.
5. Sprinkle with paprika.
